item.title: Gilead's Long-Acting HIV Pill (Phase 2/3 Trial)
item.description:
• Summary: Gilead has discontinued a Phase 2/3 clinical trial evaluating a long-acting oral pill regimen for HIV treatment. The termination of this trial indicates the company is halting development for this specific formulation or dosing strategy in its HIV pipeline.
  • MoAs: N/A (Specific antiretroviral MoA for the discontinued pill not provided)
  • Sources: Endpoints News
